name: kage
description: 影 — a theatre of shadows, cast by a lamp you hold. One warm light, one wall, and paper cutouts standing in between. A point-light projection throws each cutout onto the wall: the nearer it stands to the flame, the larger and softer its shadow; pressed to the wall, it shrinks to life size and the edges sharpen (penumbra b = r(W−p)/p). Move the lamp and the shadows swing; nothing draws the shape but light and distance. The flame's flicker is a deterministic function of time, so the same scene (#s=) casts the same shadows. Zero dependencies, offline.
